steps.title: Evaluate the given function at x = 2
steps.content: To find \( f(2) \), substitute x with 2 in the provided formula:$$f(x) = x^3 + 19.$$Substituting, we get $$f(2) = 2^3 + 19.$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Calculate \( 2^3 \), which equals 8:$$8 + 19.$$Now, adding these values together yields B is correct.
